hindu_devi: Supreme Goddess (Mahadevi) of the Devi Mahatmya — the transcendent Shakti underlying all deities; conceived as source rather than progeny or spouse, with no individuated in-registry kin distinct from her own emanations.
hindu_soma: Vedic soma/moon deity; the lunar-dynasty progenitor whose canonical kin (Tara, Budha, the 27 Nakshatra-wives daughters of Daksha) are not present in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kinship to anchor.
hindu_agni: Vedic fire-god; among the most-invoked Rigvedic deities but his canonical kin (consort Svaha, the priest-fathers, his many ritual births) are not represented in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kinship to anchor.
hindu_prithvi: Vedic earth-goddess paired in the Rigveda with the sky-father Dyaus Pita, who is absent from this registry; her dvandva partner and other Vedic kin are unregistered, leaving no same-tradition bond to anchor.
hindu_ushas: Vedic dawn-goddess; daughter of Dyaus and sister of Ratri (Night) in the Rigveda, none of whom are present in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kinship to anchor.
welsh_gwyn_ap_nudd: Otherworld hunter-king 'son of Nudd'; the registry holds Lludd Llaw Eraint but the scholarly equation of his father Nudd with that figure is contested, and his rival Gwythyr and beloved Creiddylad are unregistered, leaving no secure same-tradition bond.
haida_djilaqons: Founding ancestress of the Eagle moiety in Swanton's Haida texts; a primordial matron of fresh water and salmon with no attested kinship of spouse/sibling/parent type to other registered Haida beings.
haida_foam_woman: Founding ancestress and structural counterpart of Djila'qons (the other moiety's matron); the two are parallel moiety-founders, not kin, and no allowed kinship kind connects her to other registered Haida figures.
haida_master_carpenter: Deity-class culture-hero whose name Nankilstlas overlaps with Raven himself in some tellings; recorded as a craft-figure with no attested kin of the allowed kinds to other registered Haida beings.
haida_raven: Yáahl the trickster-transformer and demiurge; a culture-hero who names the Raven moiety but, in the recorded Haida cycle, holds no spouse/sibling/parent bond of the allowed kinds with other registered figures.
haida_sgaana: A class of orca spirit-beings rather than a single individual; as a collective spirit-class it has no individuated kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Haida figures.
asturian_aernus: Tutelary god of the Zoelae known only from Latin dedicatory inscriptions (Deo Aerno); no mythology or genealogy survives, leaving no attested kin.
cantabrian_candamius: Cantabrian-Asturian storm/sky god attested only epigraphically (Iuppiter Candamius); no narrative tradition survives, leaving no attested kin.
cantabrian_erudinus: Harvest god known solely from the AD 161 Pico Dobra altar (Erudino); no surviving mythology or genealogy, leaving no attested kin.
cantabrian_mater_deva: Northern Iberian river-mother attested only as Mater Deva in epigraphy; a personified river with no surviving narrative kin.
hungarian_hadur: War-god and divine smith largely reconstructed by 19th-century literary tradition (Hadak Ura); the underlying figure has no attested kinship to other registered Hungarian figures.
hungarian_isten: Magyar sky-father whose name became the general word for God; the reconstructed tradition preserves no named consort or offspring, and his loose association with the Turul falls short of an allowed kinship kind.
hungarian_nimrod: Legendary giant-hunter forefather of the Magyars; his sons Hunor and Magor (the eponymous ancestors) are not present in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kin to anchor.
hungarian_turul: Totemic bird-of-prey ancestor of the Arpad dynasty; in the origin legend it sires the line through Emese, but neither Emese nor the Arpad descendants are registered, and its tie to the other Hungarian figures is associative rather than a kinship of the allowed kinds.
toba_kasogonaga: Toba/Qom lightning-and-weather deity (usually feminine) recorded by Metraux; an independent celestial power with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Toba figures.
toba_moon: Toba/Qom lunar deity; a celestial power with no attested spouse/sibling/parent bond of the allowed kinds to other registered Toba figures in the consulted sources.
toba_nowet: Toba/Qom master-of-animals spirit, ambivalent owner of game; a guardian-power with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Toba figures.
toba_sun: Toba/Qom solar deity; a celestial power with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Toba figures in the consulted sources.
anglosaxon_beowulf: Geatish hero and later king; his father Ecgtheow and uncle/lord Hygelac of the Old English epic are not present in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kin to anchor.
anglosaxon_eostre: Dawn/spring goddess named only by Bede; no narrative or genealogy survives, leaving no attested kin.
anglosaxon_wayland: Legendary master-smith (Old Norse Volundr); his brothers Egil and Slagfithr and the swan-maidens of the legend are not present in this registry, leaving no same-tradition kin.
huli_datagaliwabe: Huli high sky-god of moral and kin-law sanction; explicitly set apart from the dama nature-spirit class (never called dama) and beyond ritual manipulation, with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to Honabe, Timbu, or their children.
enga_kana_moon: Enga moon-power, female complement of the male sun; the moon is weakly personified and stands in cosmological opposition (not an attested marriage, sibling, or descent bond) to Aitawe, leaving no allowed in-registry kinship to anchor.
enga_sangai_ancestress: Cult-ancestress (spirit-wife) of the sangai/sandalu bachelors' growth rite; an ancestral cult-being rather than a named goddess, with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to Aitawe, the moon, or the sky people.
khasi_u_lei_shyllong: Tutelary mountain-god of Shillong Peak, chief of the U Ryngkew/U Basa land-guardian gods; his cult is local and territorial, with no attested spouse/sibling/descent bond of the allowed kinds linking him to the creator U Blei Nongthaw, the earth-mother, or the sun/moon.
muisca_bachue: Ancestral mother of the Muisca who rose from Lake Iguaque and returned to it as a serpent; her companion (the boy she raised and wed) is unregistered, and she stands apart from the Bochica cycle, leaving no attested in-registry kin of the allowed kinds.
muisca_chaquen: Muisca god of field boundaries, runners and festival foot-races; an independent functional deity with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Muisca figures.
muisca_nemcatacoa: Muisca patron of weavers, mantle-painters and chicha festivity, appearing as a bear or fox; an independent deity with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Muisca figures.
trobriand_mokatuboda: Master-magician of Malinowski's Kudayuri flying-canoe myth; his kin in the narrative are his sisters who fly off, but the registry's mulukwausi is an unindividuated witch-class, not those sisters, leaving no allowed-kind kinship to a registered figure.
trobriand_mulukwausi: A collective class of flying witches (the flying manifestation of the yoyova), not a single individual; as a spirit-power class it has no individuated kinship of the allowed kinds to other registered Trobriand figures.
trobriand_tudava: Pre-eminent Trobriand/Massim yam culture-hero of a distinct myth cycle; his virgin mother (Mitigis/Bolutukwa) is unregistered and he holds no attested allowed-kind kinship to the other registered Trobriand figures.
iroquois_sky_woman: Primordial mother of the Haudenosaunee cosmogony who fell from the Sky World; her kin (her daughter and the Hero Twins Sapling and Flint) are unregistered, and she stands wholly apart from the confederacy-foundation and historical figures present here.
iroquois_cornplanter: Historical post-contact Seneca war chief and diplomat; his half-brother the prophet Handsome Lake is unregistered, and he is separated by centuries from the confederacy-founding figures, leaving no attested in-registry kin of the allowed kinds.
aramean_bethel: Deified 'House of God', an oath-guarantor paired with Anat-Bethel in Neo-Assyrian treaties and at Elephantine; Anat-Bethel is unregistered, and this sacred-stone god has no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to Hadad or Atargatis.
aramean_rakib_el: Dynastic 'Charioteer of El' and tutelary of the Sam'alian royal house of Yadi; his patron El is unregistered here, and he holds no attested spouse/sibling/descent bond of the allowed kinds to the registered Hadad or Atargatis.
buryat_morgon_kara: First-shaman culture-hero whose myth turns on a contest with the supreme sky-god over a dying man's soul; the antagonist is named inconsistently across recensions (the chief tengri, not a single registered figure), so no allowed-kind kinship can be securely anchored.
desana_emekori_mahse: A collective class of celestial 'day-dimension' beings in Reichel-Dolmatoff's Desana cosmos, not a single individual; as a spirit-class belonging to the Sun-Father's luminous order it has no individuated kinship of the allowed kinds to the registered figures.
desana_vai_mahse: Master-of-animals guardian-spirit class (Vaí-mahsë) controlling game and propitiated by hunters; an autonomous master-of-game power with no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to the Sun-Father or the other registered Desana figures.
kiwai_marunogere: Culture-hero founder of the moguru fertility rite and the first long-house (Landtman 1917/1927); one of the renowned Kiwai heroes alongside Sido and Nuga but from a distinct strand, with no attested allowed-kind kinship linking them.
kiwai_nuga: Crocodile-man origin-ancestor born from wood (Landtman 1917/1927); a parallel theriomorphic culture-hero standing beside Sido and Marunogere without any attested kinship of the allowed kinds to them.
pomo_coyote: Creator-trickster (Barrett 1933) whose Pomo personal name and identity are inconsistently transcribed and who in places overlaps with the creator Marumda rather than standing in a stable kin relation; no allowed-kind kinship to the registered figures can be securely anchored.
pomo_ragno: Primordial spider-grandmother known only by de Angulo's Italian gloss 'Ragno', her native name unrecorded; an 'Old Mother' ancestress with no securely attested kinship of the allowed kinds to Marumda, Kuksu, or Coyote.
tiv_takuruku: Legendary human apical ancestor from whom the Tiv reckon agnatic descent (line Shon–Takuruku–Awange), not a worshipped god; Shon and Awange are unregistered, and he holds no attested kinship of the allowed kinds to the sky-god Aondo or the akombo.
aboriginal_baiame: Sky-father creator of the Kamilaroi (and neighbouring groups); his wife Birrahgnooloo and son Daramulum are unregistered, and he is the sole Kamilaroi figure in this briefing, leaving no same-tradition kin of the allowed kinds to anchor.
kirati_tagera_ningwaphuma: Supreme Limbu knowledge-mother before creation; the registered Yuma Sammang and Theba Sammang are her own maternal and paternal aspects/personifications rather than distinct individuated kin, leaving no allowed-kind kinship (as source, not progeny or spouse) to anchor.
nivkh_tol_yz: Master-of-the-sea spirit (tol = sea, yz = master) forming the structural land/sea counterpart of Pal-yz' (Shternberg); the two are parallel domain-masters of separate realms, not attested kin or companions of any allowed kind.
tlingit_thunderbird: Male thunder-being (with the lightning-creature Kah-lit folded in); a sky-power standing apart from the Raven–Petrel–Khanukh freshwater-origin contest, with no attested kinship or rivalry of the allowed kinds to those registered figures in Swanton's texts.
chinese_caishen: God of Wealth (Zhao Gongming); his attested kin (the Three Xiao sisters, Fengshen Yanyi associates) are not present in this registry.
chinese_guanyin: Bodhisattva of compassion; her legendary kin (King Miaozhuang in the Miaoshan tale) are not in registry, and her Journey-to-the-West role over the pilgrims is institutional, not kinship.
chinese_houyi: Divine archer; his sole in-registry kin is his wife Chang'e, and that spouse edge is recorded on Chang'e's entry (symmetric, one side only). No other registry kin attested.
chinese_leigong: Thunder God; his consort Dianmu (lightning) and the Ministry of Thunder colleagues are not present in this registry.
chinese_pangu: Primordial cosmic giant self-generated from chaos/the world-egg (Sanwu Liji); no parents and no kin among registry figures.
chinese_shennong: Flame Emperor / Divine Farmer; one of the Three Sovereigns, but co-membership with Fuxi and Nuwa is not kinship, and his lineage (mother Nudeng, the Yandi line) is not in registry.
chinese_zao_jun: Kitchen God; a household deity whose wife and the deities he annually reports to (Jade Emperor) form a bureaucratic, not kinship, network. No in-registry kin.
inca_illapa: Thunder/weather god; one of the three great Inca state cults but with no genealogy in the chronicle tradition; no attested kin among registry figures.
inca_mama_cocha: Sea-mother goddess; her occasional pairing with Viracocha as consort is a weak/variant tradition, and she has no firmly attested kin among registry figures.
inca_mama_sara: Maize-mother goddess (Saramama); an independent agricultural deity with no attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
inca_supay: God/spirit of the underworld (Uku Pacha); an independent chthonic power with no attested genealogy linking to registry figures.
aztec_tonatiuh: God of the Fifth Sun, born when Nanahuatzin immolated himself at Teotihuacan; his origin figures are not in registry and he has no attested kin among registry figures.
aztec_xiuhtecuhtli: Aged fire god at the cosmic center; his 'father of the gods' epithet is honorific/identificatory (Huehueteotl), not a genealogical tie to specific registry figures.
aymara_amaru: The cosmic two-headed serpent of water and renewal; a symbolic power with no attested kin among Aymara registry figures.
aymara_inti: The Sun (Tata Inti) in Aymara tradition; an independent solar deity. The sun-earth pairing with Pachamama is complementary, not an attested kin/spouse tie in Aymara sources.
aymara_mallku: Mountain-lord/achachila spirit (condor protector of the high peaks); an independent tutelary spirit with no attested kin among Aymara registry figures.
aymara_tunupa: Pre-Inca creator and thunder-lightning god of the Titicaca basin; his link to Viracocha is cross-tradition syncretism (an identity), not in-registry Aymara kinship.
hausa_dan_galadima: Bori spirit ('son of the Galadima'); the bori pantheon (Besmer 1983) is organized by spirit-houses but with no firm citable kinship to registry figures, and Hausa has no non-isolated anchor.
hausa_inna: Senior female bori spirit ('Mother', of the wild Doguwa); a domain/category spirit with no firm attested kin among registry figures and no non-isolated Hausa anchor.
hausa_kure: Wild bush bori spirit (the Hyena); a category spirit with no attested genealogical kin among registry figures and no non-isolated Hausa anchor.
hausa_kuturu: Bori affliction-spirit (the Leper, domain of leprosy); no attested kinship to other registry figures and no non-isolated Hausa anchor.
hausa_sarkin_aljan_suleimanu: Supreme head/king of the bori pantheon; his rulership over the other spirits is hierarchical, not kinship, and Hausa has no non-isolated anchor to link to.
mordvin_ange_patyai: Erzya mother-goddess of birth; the only source linking her as consort/mother of the other deities is Melnikov-Pechersky, whose pantheon is regarded as unreliable. No reliable in-registry kin.
mordvin_ineshkipaz: Supreme Erzya sky-god; no reliably attested kinship to other registry figures (the Melnikov-Pechersky genealogy linking him to Ange Patyai is repudiated), and no non-isolated Mordvin anchor.
mordvin_norovava: Erzya field/grain-mother (Norov-ava), one of many independent ava patronesses of domains; no reliably attested kin among registry figures.
mordvin_vedeava: Erzya water-mother (Ved'-ava), an independent ava patroness; no reliably attested kin among registry figures.
udmurt_inmumy: Udmurt sky-mother (In-mumy), one of the -mumy mother-goddess class; her pairing with the sky-god Inmar is structural/complementary, not an attested kin tie.
udmurt_kyldysin: Udmurt earth-and-fertility god; ranked below Inmar but a functional counterpart (earth vs sky), not a kinsman, with no attested genealogy.
udmurt_shundy_mumy: Udmurt sun-mother (Shundy-mumy), one of the -mumy mother-goddess triad; a domain-mother with no attested kin among registry figures.
udmurt_vumurt: Udmurt water-spirit (Vumurt, 'water-man'), a master-class spirit paired with the forest-man Nulesmurt (not in registry); no attested kin among registry figures.
baule_asie: Baule earth-god/bush-spirit (asye usu); the sky-god/earth complementarity with Nyamien is structural and the Akan-analogy marriage is not firmly attested for the Baule. No non-isolated Baule anchor.
baule_mbotumbo: Baule monkey power-object (gbekre/amwin) of the men's society; a ritual power, not a genealogical figure, with no attested kin and no non-isolated Baule anchor.
baule_nyamien: Baule creator sky-god (cognate with Akan Nyame); the remote creator with no firmly attested in-tradition kinship and no non-isolated Baule anchor to link to.
garo_goera: Garo thunder-and-strength deity; a great god of the pantheon under the creator, but Garo cosmogony does not firmly genealogize the great deities as kin. No attested in-registry kinship.
garo_saljong: Garo sun-and-harvest deity (Misi-Saljong); a domain-deity of the pantheon with no firmly attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
garo_susime: Garo wealth/prosperity goddess; a domain-deity (mite) with no firmly attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
ibibio_abasi_isong: Ibibio earth-deity (Abasi Isong), the earth counterpart to the sky-god Abasi; explicitly distinct from the consort Atai. The sky/earth complementarity is aspectual, not an attested kin tie.
ibibio_ekpe: Ibibio/Efik leopard-spirit tutelary of the Ekpe (Mgbe) society; a bush/society spirit with no attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
ibibio_ndem: Ibibio/Efik class of tutelary water-deities (Idem/Ndem); a spirit-class with no attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
lepcha_komsithing: Culture-hero rum, author of the ingzong sworn-bond; his possible identity with 'Kumsiting', consort of the creatress, is unstable across transcriptions, and he is framed separately, no firm kin tie.
palauan_medechiibelau: Trickster culture-figure (the rooster-crow ruse halting the stairway to heaven); an episodic trickster with no attested kin tie to the Palauan creator figures.
palauan_mengidabrutkoel: Spider culture-hero whose tale charters human childbirth; a theriomorphic culture-bringer with no firmly attested kin tie to the creator figures.
veps_metsanisand: Veps forest-master (Mecan izand); a domain master-spirit paired with a forest-mistress (not in registry), with no kinship to other registry figures and no non-isolated Veps anchor.
veps_pertinizand: Veps house-master (Pertin izand); a domain master-spirit with no attested kinship to other registry figures and no non-isolated Veps anchor.
veps_vedenizand: Veps water-master (Veden izand); a domain master-spirit paired with a water-mistress (veden emag, not in registry), with no kinship to other registry figures and no non-isolated Veps anchor.
balinese_dewi_danu: Goddess of Lake Batur; her conceptual pairing with the volcano-god of Gunung Agung is a water/fire complementarity, not an attested kin or spouse tie.
balinese_sang_hyang_widhi: The formless supreme godhead (Acintya) of modern Balinese Hinduism; the other deities as its emanations is a monistic-theological derivation, not attested genealogical kinship.
celtiberian_cariociecus: War-god attested only epigraphically as Mars Cariociecus (an epithet of Mars); no narrative genealogy and no attested kinship to Lugus or other registry figures.
celtiberian_neto: Radiant war/solar god attested epigraphically (Latin Neto/Neton; Celtiberian Neito); no narrative genealogy and no attested kinship to other registry figures.
dinka_macardit: The 'great black one', a fierce free-divinity of sterility and death; an independent free-divinity (Lienhardt) with no attested genealogical kin among registry figures.
dinka_nhialic: Supreme Divinity identified with the sky, encompassing the free- and clan-divinities; this encompassment is theological, not attested genealogical kinship to the other divinities.
kwakwakawakw_sisiutl: Double-headed serpent crest-being; cosmologically grouped with Thunderbird and Dzunukwa as a foremost crest but with no attested kinship to other registry beings.
kwakwakawakw_umelth: Raven the transformer/culture-hero (cognate with Haida Yaahl, Tlingit Yeil); interacts episodically with other beings but has no attested kinship among registry figures.
tupi_tupa: Tupa, the thunder-power directing creation; an independent storm deity not genealogically integrated with the Monan-Maira creator cycle in the Tupinamba sources.
aboriginal_bunjil: Eaglehawk creator of the Kulin; his kin (his brother Waa the crow and his sons) are not present in this registry, and Kulin has no other figures to link to.
luwian_iyarri: Archer god of plague and war (cf. Erra); invoked in rituals and treaties with no genealogy in the texts, and his link to the Marwainzi is a collective association, not attested kinship.
mongol_alan_gua: Borjigin ancestress whose Heaven-begotten sons and descendants (Genghis's line) are absent from registry; the light-being progenitor is not cleanly the registry's Tengri, and her own kin are absent.
phrygian_men: Anatolian/Phrygian moon-god of months, time and fate; associated with the Mother-goddess cult but with no attested kinship to Cybele, Attis or Sabazios.
lusitanian_ataecina: Lusitanian underworld goddess known only from Latin-period votive epigraphy; no narrative myth or attested kin survives. No in-registry Lusitanian kinship.
lusitanian_bandua: Lusitanian tutelary/community god attested only in dedicatory inscriptions (Bandua/Bandi/Bandue); no mythic narrative or attested kinship exists.
lusitanian_bormanicus: Lusitanian thermal-spring healing god known solely from votive dedications (Bormanico); no myth or family relations are attested.
lusitanian_crouga: Lusitanian cairn-god attested only on the Lamas de Moledo inscription; no genealogy or relational myth survives.
lusitanian_duberdicus: Lusitanian water-numen known only from votive epigraphy; no narrative tradition records any kin.
lusitanian_endovelicus: Lusitano-Roman healing/oracular god of the Sao Miguel da Mota sanctuary; abundant ex-voto inscriptions but no myth and no attested kinship.
lusitanian_laebo: Deity named in the dative in the Cabeco das Fraguas inscription; even number and gender are uncertain. No attested kin.
lusitanian_munidis: Lusitanian deity (Munidi/Munis) attested only epigraphically; no myth or relational data exists.
lusitanian_quangeius: Lusitanian hound-god known only from votive dedications (Quangeio); the psychopomp role is a scholarly inference and no kin is attested.
lusitanian_reve: Lusitanian high/sky deity attested only in votive inscriptions with epithets; no genealogy survives.
lusitanian_runesocesius: Lusitanian god known from a single dedicatory context near Ebora; no myth and no attested kinship.
lusitanian_trebaruna: Lusitanian domestic/protective goddess attested only epigraphically; the shared *trebo- root with Trebopala is etymological, not attested kinship.
lusitanian_trebopala: Deity invoked in the Cabeco das Fraguas inscription; no narrative myth or family relations are attested in any source.
slavic_lada: Attested only in late-medieval ritual refrains (with Lado/Lel); no source records kinship to Perun, Mokosh or other registry deities.
slavic_marzanna: Winter/death goddess of ritual drowning rites; no primary source attests kinship to any other Slavic deity in the registry.
slavic_rod: God of kinship/birth named with the rozhanitsy; the 'progenitor of all gods' reading is Rybakov's modern reconstruction, not attested genealogy. No attested in-registry kin.
slavic_simargl: Seed-and-plant guardian of Vladimir's 980 pantheon (possibly from Iranian Simurgh); no attested kinship to any Slavic figure.
slavic_stribog: Wind god whose 'grandsons are the winds' (Tale of Igor's Campaign); the winds are not registry figures and no kin-link to other named deities is attested.
slavic_triglav: Pomeranian three-headed god of Szczecin/Wolin recorded in saints' lives; no attested family relations to any other Slavic deity.
greek_hesiod_eros: Hesiod's primordial Eros (Theogony 116-122) arises among the first beings without parent and begets no offspring; the later son-of-Aphrodite Eros is a separate figure. No in-registry kin.
greek_hesiod_iris: Daughter of Thaumas and the Oceanid Electra (Theogony 265-266); neither parent nor her siblings the Harpies are in the registry, and her consort Zephyrus is also absent.
greek_hesiod_nike: Daughter of the Titan Pallas and Styx (Theogony 383-385); her parents and siblings Zelus, Kratos and Bia are not in the registry.
edo_esu: Trickster adopted from the Yoruba Eshu, worshipped chiefly in border areas; not attested as kin to Osanobua's children (Olokun, Ogiuwu) or any Edo figure.
maya_ah_puch: Yucatec skeletal death god (God A / Kisin); the Xibalba death-lords Hun-Came and Vucub-Came are separate figures. No genealogy is given for Ah Puch in the codices or Popol Vuh.
maya_kinich_ahau: Sun god (God G); his proposed identity as the solar aspect or son of Itzamna is iconographic and contested, not an attested genealogy. No firm in-registry kin.
maya_yum_kaax: Maize/forest god (God E); the scholarly identification of the Classic Maize God with Hun Hunahpu is iconographic and contested, not a recorded genealogy. No firm in-registry kin.
basque_basajaun: Wild-wood giant of Basque folklore (Barandiaran); the Basajaunak are a race and his pairing with Basandere is not a registry figure. No attested kin to Mari or Sugaar.
basque_eate: Genie of storms and fire; not firmly attested as kin to Mari, Sugaar or any registry deity. Mari's named sons (Atarrabi, Mikelats) are not in the registry.
basque_ilargi: Moon goddess, daughter of the earth-mother Amalur and sister of the sun Eguzki; neither parent nor sibling is in the registry.
basque_ortzi: Sky/thunder god attested only by Picaud's 12th-c. gloss 'Urcia'; no narrative myth and no attested kinship survive.
vainakh_maetsill: Ingush god of agriculture and harvest (Maetsill/Maetsel), tied to the Mat-Lam sanctuary; no source attests kinship to Dela, Seela or other Vainakh figures.
tamil_ayyanar: Pre-Vedic Tamil village-boundary guardian on his white stallion; his later syncretic identity with Ayyappan/Shasta is pan-Hindu, and he has no attested kinship to Korravai, Mayon or Murugan.
luo_juogi: Collective spirit-class (juogi) of the Luo; no individual genealogy, and the Luo tradition contributes no non-isolated figures to serve as link targets.
luo_luanda_magere: 18th-c. invincible warrior culture-hero of the Kano plains; his kin are not registered, and the Luo tradition has no non-isolated link targets.
luo_nyasaye: Luo Supreme Being; high-gods take no genealogy here, and the Luo tradition supplies no valid in-registry link targets.
luo_ramogi: Eponymous Luo migration-ancestor of Got Ramogi; no registered kin and no non-isolated Luo link targets exist.
luo_were: Luo/Luhya high-god name, treated as an aspect or alternate of Nyasaye; aspect-identity is not a kinship kind, and no Luo link targets exist.
nupe_edegi: Founder culture-hero (Tsoede/Edegi) of semi-divine Igala paternity; his Igala father is not in the registry and the Nupe tradition has no non-isolated link targets.
nupe_gunnu: Communal cult-spirit served by the Gunnuko priesthood; spirit-class with no individual kin and no valid Nupe link targets.
nupe_kuti: Class of tutelary cult-objects/masquerades (Ndako Gboya); a spirit-class with no genealogy and no Nupe link targets.
nupe_soko: Supreme sky-god of the Nupe (soko = sky and high god); no attested kin and the Nupe tradition has no non-isolated link targets.
zapotec_cocijo: Principal rain/lightning god; Zapotec theology gives functional deities no narrative genealogy, and no kinship to Coqui Xee or the death-pair Bezelao/Xonaxi is attested.
zapotec_coqui_xee: Infinite uncreated source of the gods; the emanation idea is theological abstraction, not an enumerated parentage of specific registered deities.
zapotec_pitao_copijcha: Sun-and-war god emblematized by the macaw; no attested kinship to other Zapotec deities in the registry.
zapotec_pitao_cozobi: Maize/agriculture god; no attested family relations to any other Zapotec figure.
berber_anti: Libyan giant Antaeus of Tingis; his attested parents (Poseidon and Gaia) and wife Tinge belong to other traditions and are not in-registry Berber figures.
berber_ifri: Berber goddess Ifri/Dea Africa attested epigraphically; no narrative myth records kinship to Ammon, Gurzil or any Berber figure.
gondi_anga_dev: Collective clan-god class (anga 'standard' + dev 'god'); its tie to Lingo's origin cycle is cultic, not an attested dyadic kinship to Lingo or Kali Kankali.
gondi_bhimal_pen: Rain-giant culture-hero whose name borrows from Mahabharata Bhima but whose cult is indigenous; no attested kinship to Lingo or Kali Kankali.
gondi_persa_pen: Aniconic 'great clan-god' class (often Bara Deo); a spirit-class with no individual genealogy linking it to the registered Gondi figures.
igbo_ekwensu: Trickster spirit of war and bargains; the 'devil' framing is a missionary overlay, and no source attests kinship to Chukwu or the Alusi.
igbo_ikenga: Personal deity of achievement and the right hand, embodied in a carved figure; tied to individual chi rather than the Chukwu-offspring Alusi line, with no attested kin.
lithuanian_gabija: Personified sacred hearth-fire tended with daily offerings; Lithuanian deities lack systematic genealogy and no source attests her kinship to Saule, Menulis, Perkunas or Dievas.
lithuanian_laima: Goddess of fate who pronounces destiny at birth; appears beside Saule in dainos as a companion but with no attested kinship dyad to any registered Lithuanian deity.
lithuanian_zemyna: Earth-mother goddess honoured at sowing and harvest; her occasional pairing with Perkunas is a contested reconstruction, not firmly attested kinship.
pohnpeian_luhk: Carolinian sky high-god (Luk/Lukelong); in the Isokelekel cycle the divine father is conflated with the thunder-deity Nahnsapwe, so no clean kinship dyad to a distinct registered figure exists.
pohnpeian_sapwkini: Primordial founder-settler who first raised land on Pohnpei; the later sorcerer-builders Olisihpa and Olosohpa are not attested as his kin.
vietnamese_lieu_hanh: Deified immortal and Mother Goddess of Dao Mau (16th c.), legendarily a banished daughter of the Jade Emperor (not in registry); no kinship to the Au Co / Lac Long Quan ancestral stratum.
vietnamese_tan_vien_son_thanh: Mountain god (Son Tinh) who wed the 18th Hung king's daughter My Nuong; she and his rival Thuy Tinh are not registered, so no direct kinship to Au Co or Lac Long Quan obtains.
vietnamese_thanh_giong: Miraculous giant child who repelled the An invaders under the 6th Hung king; born to an ordinary village woman (not in registry) with no kin link to Au Co or Lac Long Quan.
chamorro_chaifi: Fire-and-souls spirit of Sasalaguan; a later spirit-being with no attested kinship to the creator siblings Fu'una and Puntan.
chamorro_taotaomona: Collective ancestral spirit-class (taotaomo'na/aniti); a class entity with no individual genealogy linking it to the creator pair.
herero_ndjambi: Transcendent sky/heaven-god, functionally distinct from the ancestral creator Mukuru; no source states a kin relationship between them or to Kamangundu.
marshallese_lijebake: Theriomorphic turtle-ancestress/tutelary spirit; a culture-spirit with no attested kinship to the creator Lowa or the first pair Wulleb and Lejman.
selknam_kwanyip: Powerful southern first-ancestor hero (howenh); grouped thematically with Kenos but with no attested dyadic kinship, and his brother is not in the registry.
selknam_xalpen: Subterranean female Hain spirit linked to the Shoort masks in ritual; no attested kinship to Kenos, Kran, Kreeh or Temaukel, and Shoort is not registered.
aboriginal_wagyl: Noongar Rainbow Serpent creator of the southwest Australian waterways; the Noongar tradition contributes no non-isolated figures to serve as link targets.
dayak_tempon_telon: Ngaju soul-ferryman/psychopomp of the Tiwah death-ritual; a divine guide not attested as kin to the high-god siblings Mahatala and Jata.
hattic_wurunkatte: Hattic war-god 'king of the land', equated by the Hittites with Zababa; no source attests kinship to the sun-goddess Estan, the moon Kasku or Telipinu.
komi_voipel: Komi north-wind deity known from a reported wooden idol; stands apart from the dualistic demiurge brothers Jen and Omol, with no attested kin.
lycian_twelve_gods: Collective of anonymous armed warrior-hunter gods of the Letoon; their tie to Leto's (Lada's) circle is cultic and iconographic, not an attested kinship dyad.
mossi_naba_zid_wende: An honorific royal name and creation-cycle aspect of the sky-creator Wende himself, not a distinct person; aspect-identity is not a kinship kind, so no separate kin can be asserted.
iulius_proculus: Stub witness-figure to Romulus' apotheosis (Livy 1.16; Ovid Fasti 2.499ff). His sole tie to Romulus is testimonial, not kinship or companionship; no parents or kin attested.
roman_ianus: Primordial Roman god of beginnings with no Greek equivalent; his consort Camasene and sons Tiberinus/Fontus are not in the registry. No in-registry kin attested.
roman_luna: Old Roman moon-goddess (Sol/Luna pair) with no native Roman genealogy; her Greek mapping (Selene, Titan-born) is not in this Roman set. Sol-pairing is complementary, not attested kinship.
roman_sol: Old Roman sun-god (Sol Indiges, later Sol Invictus) with no native Roman parentage or kin; the Sol/Luna pairing is complementary cult, not attested in-registry kinship.
roman_terminus: Roman boundary-stone numen with no genealogy; his famous refusal to yield his Capitoline site to Iuppiter (Livy 1.55; Ovid Fasti 2.667ff) is a cult-precedence tale, not kinship or enmity.
thracian_derzelas: Great God ('Theos Megas') of Odessos; often conflated with the Thracian Rider's underworld aspect, but that is cult-identity/syncretism, not an attested kinship in any allowed relation kind.
thracian_gebeleizis: Getic sky/thunder god (Herodotus 4.94); scholarly identification with Zalmoxis is contested identity rather than kinship. No parents, spouse, or kin attested.
thracian_heros: The Thracian Rider is a heroized-dead/hero-god class with no genealogy; his named cult-manifestations (Karabazmos, Manimazos) are aspects of himself, not kin in any allowed relation kind.
thracian_heros_karabazmos: Underworld cult-name of the Thracian Rider at Odessos; an aspect-identity of Heros, not a distinct genealogical figure. No attested kinship.
thracian_heros_manimazos: Healing/banqueting cult-name of the Thracian Rider on the western Black Sea coast; an aspect of Heros, not kin to any registry figure. No attested kinship.
thracian_kendrisos: Local Rider-god of Philippopolis absorbed into Apollo's name; an aspect of the Thracian Horseman with no attested genealogy or in-registry kin.
thracian_kotys: Thracian goddess of the orgiastic Kotyttia (Aeschylus, Strabo); the proposed Kandaon-consort pairing is a scholarly conjecture, not an attested marriage. No firm in-registry kin.
thracian_pleistoros: War-god of the Apsinthians receiving captive sacrifice (Herodotus 9.119); virtually nothing else survives. No genealogy or in-registry kin attested.
thracian_zibelthiurdos: Thracian thunder/sky god known only from Roman-era inscriptions at Pautalia/Serdica; linguistically paired with Getic theonyms but with no attested genealogy or in-registry kin.
naga_alhou: Sumi/Sema supreme creator (Hutton, The Sema Nagas, 1921); his subordinate kungumi and tughami spirits are not in the registry, and no kin are attested for him.
naga_anungtsungba: Ao sky-god, a co-deity (tsungrem) sometimes equated with Lungkijingba; the Ao pantheon's sky/earth/dead figures are functional co-rulers, not an attested kin-group.
naga_kepenuopfu: Angami supreme creatress above the terhomi (Hutton, The Angami Nagas, 1921); the lesser terhomi are not in the registry and she has no attested kin.
naga_lijaba: Ao earth-creator/culture-hero, one of the cosmological triad (heaven/earth/dead); the triad is an ethnographic classification, not an attested family. No kin in registry.
naga_lungkijingba: Ao Chief of Heaven and life-sustainer (Mills, The Ao Nagas); co-deity with Lijaba and Meyutsungba but with no attested kinship to them or other registry figures.
naga_meyutsungba: Ao judge of the dead completing the heaven/earth/dead triad (Mills); a functional co-deity, not kin to Lungkijingba or Lijaba in any attested genealogy.
gaulish_belenos: Gaulish solar healing god (Apollo Belenus) known only from dedications and Tertullian/Ausonius; Gaulish religion preserves no native genealogy and no in-registry kin for him.
gaulish_cernunnos: Antlered god named once on the Pillar of the Boatmen; an iconographic type with no surviving native myth or genealogy, hence no in-registry kin.
gaulish_esus: Gaulish 'Lord' of Lucan's sacrificial triad (Pharsalia 1.445); grouped cultically with Taranis and Teutates but with no attested kinship or mythic fellowship and no genealogy.
gaulish_taranis: Gaulish thunderer (Lucan, Pharsalia 1.446; inscriptions); the Lucanian triad is a list of separately-worshipped gods, not attested kin. No native genealogy survives.
gaulish_teutates: Gaulish tribal-protector god (Lucan, Pharsalia 1.445); cultically listed with Esus and Taranis but with no attested kinship and no surviving genealogy.
korean_jacheongbi: Heroine grain-goddess of the Jeju Segyeong bonpuri; her lover Mun Doryeong and the farmhand Jeongsu-nam are not in the registry, leaving no in-registry kin.
aganju: Orisa of volcanoes/wilderness; the Aganju-as-father/brother-of-Shango genealogies are late diaspora (Lukumi) traditions, contested and absent from classical Oyo Yoruba. No secure in-registry kin.
bhil_bhagwan: Bhil personal high god of the Koppers-recorded creation-flood cycle; the other Bhil deities are not attested as his kin, so no in-registry kinship.
bhil_indi_raja: Bhil/Bhilala rain-god depicted in the Pithora fresco alongside Pithora; co-depiction in the ritual painting is iconographic, not attested kinship. No in-registry kin.
bhil_mogra_dev: Female ancestral/harvest goddess of the Dev Mogra shrine; no attested genealogical link to other registry Bhil deities.
bhil_pithora: Central deity of the Bhil/Rathwa Pithora painting; the fresco's many figures (incl. Indi Raja) are co-depicted cult-beings, not an attested kin-group.
sami_beaivi: Sámi sun-deity and 'mother of life' (ethnographic/drum record); her sun-maiden daughter is not in the registry, leaving no in-registry kin.
sami_jabmeahkka: Sámi goddess of death and the underworld (Jábmeáimo); her associated Akka-goddesses and underworld figures are not in the registry. No attested in-registry kin.
sami_leib_olmai: Sámi forest/hunting god ('alder-man') and bear-master, known only ethnographically; no genealogy and no in-registry kin attested.
sami_mano: Sámi moon-god of the dark season, attested only via drum-iconography; sun and moon are not natively kin in Sámi tradition, leaving no in-registry kin.
zoroastrian_haoma: Yazata of the haoma plant of the Hom Yasht (Yasna 9-11); a worship-circle yazata with no attested parentage and no in-registry kin (he grants worshippers offspring rather than having his own).
zoroastrian_tishtrya: Yazata of Sirius and the rains (Tishtar Yasht, Yasht 8); his adversary the drought-demon Apaosha is not in the registry, leaving no in-registry kin or relation.
zoroastrian_vayu: Ambivalent wind-yazata of the Ram Yasht (Yasht 15) who stands between the two spirits' domains; no attested parentage or in-registry kin.
cree_kise_manitow: Cree supreme spirit (kisê-manitow); 'manitow' is the general spirit-power and the figure has no attested genealogy or in-registry kin.
cree_memekwesiw: A non-gendered spirit-class collective (the rock/water 'little people'), not an individual with kin; no attested in-registry kinship.
cree_wisahkecahk: Cree trickster-transformer; his grandmother Nôhkom and wolf-brother of the âtayôhkêwin are not in the registry, and he is not kin to Kisê-manitow. No in-registry kin.
hopi_kokopelli: Hopi fertility katsina; his female counterpart Kokopölmana is not in the registry and he has no attested kinship to the cosmogonic figures. No in-registry kin.
hopi_masauwu: Hopi god of death/fire/earth and owner of the present world; he greets the people at emergence but is not kin to the Tawa/Sotuknang/Spider-Woman family in attested myth.
hopi_muyingwa: Hopi underworld god of germination; associated with crops and the Wuwuchim rite but with no attested genealogical link to other registry figures.
kalash_balumain: Kalash festival-bringer culture-hero who visits each Chaumos; he interacts with the pantheon but has no named in-registry parent or kin in attested tradition.
kalash_jestak: Kalash goddess of hearth and lineage (the Jestak-han); no attested genealogical link to other registry Kalash deities.
kalash_sajigor: Kalash 'pure' (onjesta) deity treated as an Indra-aspect; an aspect-identity of Indr rather than a kin relation, with no attested in-registry kinship.
mende_gbeni: Poro society's masked forest-spirit, institutional counterpart to Sande's Sowo; the Poro/Sande complementarity is sociological, not an attested mythic marriage or kinship.
mende_ngewo: Mende creator god (Ngewɔ/Leve); the mediating Poro/Sande societies and lesser ngafanga are not his attested kin, so no in-registry kinship.
mende_sowo: Sande society's masked water-spirit, institutional counterpart to Poro's Gbeni; their pairing is ritual-structural, not an attested kin or marriage bond.
shipibo_bari: Shipibo 'Father Sun'; his paired 'Mother Moon' is not in the registry, leaving no in-registry kin.
shipibo_ronin: Shipibo Cosmic Anaconda (Ronin), a primordial water-being with no attested genealogy or in-registry kin.
shipibo_yoashiko_inca: Shipibo 'Stingy Fire-Owner' (Yoashiko Inca) of the fire-theft myth; his culture-hero antagonist is not in the registry, leaving no in-registry kin.
abkhaz_aitar: Abkhaz 'sevenfold' god of livestock grouping lesser animal-patrons (Jabran, Alyshkyntyr) that are not in the registry; no attested in-registry kin.
abkhaz_antswa: Abkhaz supreme god, remote and plural-honorific; the lesser Abkhaz deities are aspects/subordinates, not his attested offspring or kin in any allowed relation.
bemba_chitimukulu: Bemba founding paramount of the crocodile clan (bena ng'andu); his brothers and the Kola migration legend are not in the registry, and he is not kin to the high-god Lesa.
bemba_lesa: Bemba high-god of sky and storm (regional form of Bantu Leza); a transcendent creator with no attested genealogy or in-registry kin.
huichol_tau: Huichol Father Sun born from a child's self-sacrifice in the fire; his emergence follows Grandfather Fire cosmologically but is not an attested parentage, leaving no in-registry kin.
semang_naga: Semang world-supporting earth-serpent; in several bands conflated with the female earth-power Manoid rather than being a distinct kin, so no firm in-registry kinship.
semang_ta_pedn: Semang high creator-deity; his pairing with the thunderer Karei is band-variable and sometimes collapses into identity, which is functional/aspectual, not attested kinship.
wabanaki_pamola: Penobscot storm-spirit of Mount Katahdin; an antagonist of climbers with no attested kinship to Gluskap or the creator-family in the registry.
aboriginal_wandjina: Kimberley cloud-and-rain creator-spirits (Worora/Wunambal/Ngarinyin); the associated Rainbow Serpent and Wallungunder are not in this single-entry tradition, leaving no in-registry kin.
itelmen_tylval: Itelmen mortal-born legendary champion explicitly outside the raven-creator (Kutkh) line; the registry's other Itelmen figures are all of Kutkh's family, so he has no in-registry kin.
lydian_kuvava: Lydian form of Syro-Anatolian Kubaba whose Sardis cult was displaced by Phrygian Cybele (Kufaws); cult-succession and goddess-type identity, not attested kinship.
nabataean_qaws: Edomite bow/storm god syncretized with Dushara at Khirbet et-Tannur; the Dushara link is identity-syncretism, not an attested kin or marriage relation.
thai_lao_phosop: Tai rice-goddess (Mae Phosop) of the rice-soul rites; her withdrawal-and-recall myths involve no kin among the registry's earth/sky/serpent figures, so no in-registry kinship.
totonac_corn_mother: Totonac maize divinity; the regenerating maize-child hero of Ichon's cycle and its old-woman/thunder figures are not separate registry entries, leaving no clean in-registry kin.
norse_ran: Her only in-registry kin is her husband Ægir, recorded on his entry (symmetric spouse, one side only); her daughters (the nine waves) are not registry figures.
norse_verdandi: Her sibling bonds to the other two Norns (Urðr, Skuld) are already recorded on their entries (symmetric sibling, one side only); no further in-registry kin is attested for Verðandi.
irish_donn: Milesian ancestor / lord of the dead at Tech Duinn; his kin are the sons of Míl (Donn died at sea before landing), none of whom are registry figures. No in-registry kinship attested.
irish_eriu: Daughter of Ernmas; sisters Banba and Fódla are not registry figures. Her one in-registry kin tie, sisterhood with the Morrígan (also daughter of Ernmas), is recorded on the Morrígan's entry.
irish_nuada: First king of the Tuatha Dé Danann; his named kin (father Echtach; varying brothers across recensions) are not registry figures and not consistently fixed. No reliable in-registry kin.
irish_ogma: Tuatha Dé champion and reputed inventor of ogham; his parentage (son of the Dagda or of Elatha, varying by text) and sons are not registry figures, so no reliable in-registry kin tie can be fixed.
inuit_anningan: Moon Man who chases his sister the Sun (Malina/Siqiniq); the Sun, his only mythic kin, is not a registry figure. No in-registry kinship attested.
inuit_nanook: Master of the polar bears; a master-of-animals spirit with no genealogical kin in Inuit tradition. No in-registry kin.
inuit_pinga: Iglulik sky-being and keeper of game and souls; a solitary 'one up there' with no attested kin relations. No in-registry kin.
inuit_sedna: Sea-mistress thrown to the deep by her father (unnamed, not a registry figure); no other kin in the corpus. No in-registry kinship attested.
inuit_sila: Indwelling air/weather life-force (Naarjuk as giant infant); an impersonal pervading power without genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
inuit_tekkeitsertok: Master of the caribou and chief land-game spirit (Boas, Baffin Land); no attested kin relations. No in-registry kin.
ainu_kamuy_fuchi: Hearth-goddess and gatekeeper to the kamuy world; venerated as the central household kamuy but without genealogical kin among the registry figures. No in-registry kin.
ainu_kim_un_kamuy: Mountain-and-bear god honoured in the iyomante bear-sending; no attested kinship to other registry kamuy. No in-registry kin.
ainu_kotan_kar_kamuy: World-shaping creator of Ainu-moshir; a demiurge without attested divine parentage or kin among the registry figures. No in-registry kin.
ainu_okikurmi: Culture-hero Ainurakkur ('father of the Ainu'); his consort Turesh-machi and descendants are not registry figures. No in-registry kinship attested.
ainu_repun_kamuy: Orca-formed god and chief of the sea-kamuy; no attested kinship to other registry figures. No in-registry kin.
maasai_enkai: Genderless Maasai high god; the entries Enkai-Narok and Enkai-Nanyokie are aspects of this same deity, not distinct kin. No genealogical kin attested.
maasai_enkai_nanyokie: The wrathful 'Red God' aspect of the one Maasai high god Enkai; an aspect/manifestation, not a kin-related being. No in-registry kinship.
maasai_enkai_narok: The benevolent 'Black God' aspect of the one Maasai high god Enkai; an aspect/manifestation, not a distinct kin-related being. No in-registry kinship.
maasai_le_eyo: First man and origin-of-death protagonist; his only registry tie is being mentored by Naiteru-kop (the demiurge), recorded on Naiteru-kop's entry. No kin attested.
maasai_olapa: Moon deity wed to the Sun in Hollis's narrative; the Sun, her spouse, is not a registry figure. No in-registry kinship attested.
arabian_hubal: Chief god of the Meccan Ka'ba (Ibn al-Kalbi, Kitab al-Asnam); the three goddesses are 'daughters of Allah', not of Hubal, and his own kin are not given. No in-registry kin.
arabian_imru_al_qais: Historical Kindite poet-prince (Mu'allaqa); his father Hujr and other kin are historical persons, none of them registry figures. No in-registry kin.
arabian_antara: Poet-warrior of the Mu'allaqat; his father Shaddad and mother Zabiba are historical persons, not registry figures. No in-registry kinship attested.
arabian_hatim_al_tai: Banu Tayy generosity-figure; his historical kin (son 'Adi ibn Hatim) are not registry figures. No in-registry kin attested.
chewa_chisumphi: A territorial-cult name/aspect of the one Chewa supreme being (cf. Chiuta, Mulungu); an aspect, not a distinct kin-related figure. No genealogical kin attested.
chewa_chiuta: Chewa sky-creator high god (also Mulungu, Leza, Namalenga); a withdrawn supreme being without divine parentage or kin among registry figures. No in-registry kin.
chewa_kasiya_maliro: Great Mother Antelope, a Nyau spirit-class / cosmic maternal principle, not an individual with genealogical kin. No in-registry kinship attested.
chewa_mphambe: Lightning aspect of the one Chewa supreme being (Chiuta/Mulungu); a theophany/aspect, not a distinct kin-related figure. No in-registry kin.
sotho_tswana_badimo: Collective ancestral spirit-class (badimo/balimo), not an individual; no genealogical kin recorded. No in-registry kin.
sotho_tswana_malope: Eponymous Tswana founding ancestor; the clans descend through his sons (Kwena, Kgatla, Ngwato, Ngwaketse), none of whom are registry figures. No in-registry kin attested.
sotho_tswana_modimo: Supreme Being of the Sotho-Tswana ('the One Above'); a remote high god without attested parentage or kin among registry figures. No in-registry kin.
sotho_tswana_senkatana: Basotho deliverer-hero of the Kgodumodumo legend; his mother (the sole survivor who bore him) is unnamed and not a registry figure. No in-registry kinship attested.
finnish_ahti: Water-god of the deep, dwelling with his consort Vellamo, who is not a registry figure. No in-registry kinship attested.
finnish_ilmatar: Primordial air-virgin and mother of Väinämöinen; that single maternity tie is already recorded on Väinämöinen's entry (descendant of -> finnish_ilmatar). No further in-registry kin.
finnish_pekko: Finnic god of barley, crops and brewing (Agricola's 1551 list, Seto tradition); a vegetation deity without attested kin. No in-registry kin.
chaga_murile: Chaga folktale culture-hero of the Mrile/Murile cycle; a mortal youth whose family are ordinary humans, not registry figures. No in-registry kinship attested.
chaga_ruwa: Chaga sun-high-god and Supreme Being of Kilimanjaro; a remote creator without attested parentage or kin among registry figures. No in-registry kin.
chaga_warimu: Collective ancestral spirit-class (warimu), not an individual; no genealogical kin recorded. No in-registry kin.
guanche_achuguayo: Moon-god of Tenerife attested only in later compendia; no kinship to the high-god Achaman or the sun-god Magec is recorded. No in-registry kin.
guanche_acoran: Supreme being of Gran Canaria; a cognate/island-variant of Achaman, entered separately by name, not a kin relation. No genealogical kin attested.
guanche_bencomo: Historical mencey of Taoro who resisted the Castilian conquest; his son Bentor and brother Tinguaro are historical persons, not registry figures. No in-registry kin.
ijaw_adumu: Chief of the owuamapu water-spirit class; a spirit-class personification, not an individual with genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
ijaw_egbesu: War-and-justice deity named as one 'face of divine power' alongside Tamuno and Woyengi; a parallel aspect, not a kin relation. No in-registry kinship attested.
ijaw_tamuno: Kalabari/eastern Ijaw supreme creator; a regional variant overlapping in role with Woyengi, not kin to her. A remote creator without attested kin. No in-registry kin.
lozi_kamonu: First man and culture-hero; his relationship to the creator Nyambe is that of troublesome creature (prompting the creator's withdrawal), not a kinship tie. No in-registry kin.
lozi_spider_litooma: The Spider of Heaven's Road, an animal-helper spirit who spins the thread for the creator's ascent; a spirit-class agent, not an individual with kin. No in-registry kin.
sabaean_amm: National moon/weather-god of Qataban ('Paternal Uncle'); South Arabian national gods lack developed genealogies and no kin among registry figures is attested. No in-registry kin.
sabaean_sin: National god (Sayin) of Hadramawt, a moon-god of the Shabwa temple; a distinct kingdom's patron without attested kinship to the Sabaean triad. No in-registry kin.
sabaean_wadd: National moon-god of Ma'in ('Wadd is father'); the formula is devotional, not genealogical, and no kin among registry figures is attested. No in-registry kin.
yanomami_omama: Creator-demiurge; his wife is the daughter of the water-monster Tëpërësiki and his brother is Yoasi, none of them registry figures. His creation of the xapiri is not a kinship tie. No in-registry kin.
yanomami_periboriwe: The Moon of the 'Moonblood' myth, from whose spilled blood the Yanomami arose; his descendants are not named registry figures. No in-registry kinship attested.
yanomami_xapiri: The xapiri/hekura ancestral image-spirits, a collective spirit-class created by Omama; not an individual with genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
andamanese_juruwin: Collective spirit-class of the sea dead (paired with the lau, forest dead); not an individual with genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
andamanese_lau: Collective spirit-class of the forest dead (paired with the juruwin, sea dead); not an individual with genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
bororo_aroe: The aroe, souls/eternal totemic forms of the dead, a collective spirit-class rendered as deity; not an individual with kin. No in-registry kin.
bororo_bope: The bope, transforming spirits of natural process, a collective spirit-class rendered as deity; not an individual with kin. No in-registry kin.
chukchi_dawn: Dawn, pre-eminent among the vaʼirgьt direction-Beings recorded by Bogoras; a sacred Being receiving sacrifice, not a figure with genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
chukchi_pole_star: The Pole-Star / 'Nail-Star' (Unpener), a celestial Being among the vaʼirgьt; a sacred Being without genealogical kin. No in-registry kin.
karbi_peng: Tutelary household goddess, explicitly distinct from the supreme Hemphu-Mukrang-Rasinja triad; a domestic protective deity without attested kin. No in-registry kin.
otomi_zithu: Malevolent underworld 'Lord of Demons'; his sole registry tie, enmity with the boy-who-became-the-sun, is recorded on otomi_sun_boy's entry. Otherwise without attested kin.
shona_dzivaguru: A separate Korekore territorial earth-divinity (Great Pool), distinct from Mwari and not consistently gendered; no attested kin among registry figures. No in-registry kin.
shona_mwari: Genderless high god of the Matonjeni shrines; his paternity of the mhondoro Chaminuka and Nehanda is recorded on their entries, and he has no co-parent or other in-registry kin.
yamana_watauinewa: Yámana supreme being known only through prayer and oral tradition (Gusinde 1937); a remote sky-god without attested kin. No in-registry kin.
yamana_yoalox_brothers: A composite dyad of culture-hero brothers (their sister Yoálox-tárnuxipa is bundled into this same entry); no external in-registry kin. No in-registry kin.
hurrian_alalu: Primordial first king of heaven; his paternity of Kumarbi ('his seed') is recorded on Kumarbi's entry, and his deposer/antagonist Anu is not a registry figure. No further in-registry kin.
estonian_tharapita: Earliest attested Estonian high god (Chronicle of Henry of Livonia, 13th c.); the chronicle gives him no kin, and the literary Kalevipoeg-cycle figures are unrelated. No in-registry kin.
ket_doh: The first shaman (Doχ), prototype of shamanic flight; included as a parallel to other Siberian first-shaman figures, with no attested kinship to other Ket figures. No in-registry kin.
koryak_universe: The remote high-god Naininen ('Universe/Outer-world'), distinct from the active creator Big-Raven and rarely narrated; no attested kin. No in-registry kin.
mari_tul_ava: Fire-Mother, one of a parallel series of natural-force 'mothers' (with Mlande-Ava, Vüd-Ava, Mardezh-Ava); the series is thematic, not an attested kinship/sibling group. No in-registry kin.
ndebele_amadlozi: Collective ancestral spirit-class (amadlozi/abezimu), not an individual; no genealogical kin recorded. No in-registry kin.
selkup_ilyntyl_kota: Life-mother / supreme old-woman and grandmother of the hero Icha; that single tie is already recorded on Icha's entry (descendant of -> selkup_ilyntyl_kota). No further in-registry kin.
tibetan_pehar: Gyalpo spirit subdued by Padmasambhava (not a registry figure) and installed as guardian of Samyé / the Nechung oracle; a dharmapāla without attested kin. No in-registry kin.
yakut_ai_toyon: Yakut god of light (eagle on the world-tree), a benevolent Aiyy; co-membership in the Aiyy class with Ürüng Aiyy Toyon is not a fixed kinship or attested individual alliance. No in-registry kin.
japanese_ame_no_uzume: Dawn/mirth goddess of the rock-cave episode; Kojiki/Nihon Shoki give her no parentage, and her spouse Sarutahiko and the Sarume clan are unregistered, leaving no in-registry kin edge.
japanese_inari: Rice/agriculture kami of fluid identity (variously Uka-no-Mitama, Ukemochi, Toyouke); no stable parentage in Kojiki/Nihon Shoki and none of those associated figures is registered here.
japanese_ryujin: Dragon sea-god of the undersea palace; his daughter Toyotama-hime and the Yamasachi cycle are not registered in this briefing, so no same-tradition kinship edge is attestable.
egyptian_hapi: Androgynous personification of the Nile inundation; Egyptian sources give Hapi no parentage or kinship narrative, and no associated figure is registered here.
mapuche_anchimallen: A familiar-spirit (flying fire-ball) manufactured from a fire-stone by a machi or kalku, not a being with parentage or kin; an artifact-spirit class with no attested in-registry relations.
mapuche_kushe: The 'old woman' is one of the four co-equal aspects of the single fourfold supreme being Ngenechen (with the unregistered old man Fücha); an aspect-identity, not a kin relation.
mapuche_ngenechen: The fourfold supreme being whose four personae (elder/young man and woman) are aspects of one godhead, not distinct kin; has no parentage, spouse or sibling in Mapuche tradition.
mapuche_pillan: A collective class of ancestral storm-spirits of the deified warrior-dead dwelling in volcanoes, not an individuated figure with parentage or kin edges.
mapuche_wangulen: A collective class of star-women (virtuous women become benevolent star-spirits), not a single figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested.
canaanite_kotharot: The seven swallow-goddesses are a collective of divine midwives attending births and the Yarikh–Nikkal wedding (KTU 1.24); they preside over conception but have no parentage or kin of their own.
canaanite_yarikh: Moon-god who weds the orchard-goddess Nikkal in KTU 1.24; his bride Nikkal and her father Khirkhibi are not registered here, leaving no same-tradition kin edge to record.
turkic_asena: She-wolf eponymous ancestress of the Ashina/Göktürk royal house; her descendants (the historical Ashina qaghans) are not registered here, so no in-registry kin edge is attestable.
turkic_od: Personified fire-father of the steppe hearth; Turkic tradition gives Od no parentage or kinship narrative and no associated figure is registered.
turkic_oghuz_khagan: Miraculously-born eponymous ancestor of the Oghuz; his six sons (Gün, Ay, Yıldız, Gök, Dağ, Deniz Khan) and his parents are not registered here, so no same-tradition kin edge can be recorded.
buganda_katonda: Supreme creator standing above the balubaale pantheon; Baganda tradition gives Katonda no genealogy, spouse or offspring, marking him a remote high-god without kin.
buganda_kawumpuli: Lubaale of plague among the balubaale; no parentage or kinship to other registered Baganda deities is attested for him.
fijian_dakuwaqa: Pre-eminent shark-god; his myths (reef-guardian duels, courtship of the Kadavu spirit) involve figures not registered here, and no parentage is attested, leaving no in-registry kin edge.
fijian_ratumaibulu: Harvest/underworld deity only loosely 'associated with Degei' in some local traditions; the association is variable and non-genealogical, so no firm in-registry kin edge can be asserted.
fijian_veli: A collective class of little forest-spirits, not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested.
taino_boinayel: Rain-bringing twin; his complementary twin Márohu and their serpent-mother Iguanaboina (per Pané) are not registered here, so no same-tradition kin edge can be recorded.
taino_guabancex: The violent storm-aspect of the goddess Atabey rather than a distinct kin-bearing being; her storm-heralds Guataubá and Coatrisquie are not registered, leaving no in-registry kin edge.
taino_maquetaurie_guayaba: Lord of the dead in Coaybay; his realm's guardian, the dog-zemi Opiyelguabirán, is not registered, and Pané records no parentage or kin for him.
polynesian_hina: Lunar goddess whose mother-of-Māui role is the Hawaiian variant; the Māori tradition used here makes Māui's mother Taranga, so no in-registry kin edge fits without crossing variants.
cherokee_asgaya_gigagei: The 'Red Man' thunder-spirit invoked in healing formulas; a power addressed in conjuration rather than a figure with narrative kin, with no attested parentage or relations.
cherokee_nunnehi: A collective immortal spirit-people of the highlands, not an individuated figure; no parentage or kinship to other registered Cherokee beings is attested.
cherokee_unetlanvhi: An impersonal supreme creating spirit given no human form; though sharing the 'apportioner' epithet with the Sun (Unelanuhi), it is a distinct being with no genealogy or kin.
hmong_nyuj_vaj_tuam_teem: Lord of the otherworld bureaucracy; his counterpart-judge Ntxwj Nyug is not registered here, so no same-tradition kin or relation edge can be recorded.
hmong_yaj_yuam: Heroic archer of the mythic age of many suns; Hmong tradition records no parentage or kin for him, and no associated figure is registered.
javanese_nyai_roro_kidul: Queen of the Southern Sea; her bonds are to the historical Mataram sultans (her spiritual consorts) and to her origin as princess Dewi Kadita, none of whom is registered here.
javanese_sunan_lawu: Deified spirit-king of Mount Lawu (legendarily the last Majapahit king Brawijaya V); his Majapahit royal kin are not registered here, leaving no same-tradition kin edge.
santal_jaher_era: Lady of the Sacred Grove, co-invoked with Marang Buru and the Moreko-Turuiko as a principal bonga; the cult-pairing is functional, not genealogical, and Santal tradition gives her no parentage or kin.
santal_moreko_turuiko: A collective of five-and-six village-guardian bongas, not an individuated figure; no parentage or kinship is attested for the class.
santal_thakur_jiu: Remote supreme sun-creator (Sing Bonga); the first human pair Pilcu Haram and Pilcu Budhi are mentored by Marang Buru, not kin to Thakur Jiu, and no genealogy is attested for the high-god.
yapese_gavur_li_yel_yel: Primordial sky-maker senior to Yalafath in the layered Yapese cosmogony; the relationship is one of cosmogonic precedence (older maker above later maker), not attested procreation or kinship.
yapese_yalafath: Sky high-god and creator of humankind, ranked beneath the older sky-makers Gavur li yel yel and Yanolop; that seniority is cosmogonic precedence, not stated parentage or kin.
yapese_taliw: A collective class of shrine-spirits (kan/taliw), not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested.
circassian_sozeresh: God of fertility and the hearth, paired in the agrarian cult with the harvest-god Thaghaledj, who is not registered here; no parentage or kin to registered Circassian figures is attested.
circassian_tha: Remote 'Great God' sky-deity, a deus otiosus of the Nart cycle; he stands outside the Nart family's genealogy and no kin link to the registered Nart figures is attested.
khmer_neak_ta: A collective class of tutelary land-guardian spirits, not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested for the class.
khmer_soma: Naga-princess foundress of Funan; her consort Kaundinya/Preah Thong is not registered, and the Kambu–Mera pair belongs to the separate Kambuja origin legend, so no in-registry kin edge fits.
pawnee_north_star: Polaris, appointed by Tirawa to keep the other stars on course; an office of cosmic governance, not kinship, and the Pawnee star-gods are not reckoned kin to one another.
pawnee_tirawa: Supreme creator who governs the cosmos through the star-gods and his messenger Paruxti; the stars are his instruments rather than offspring, and no registered Pawnee figure descends from him.
tibetan_nyenchen_tanglha: A specific mountain-god of the yul-lha type, oath-bound by Padmasambhava and guardian of Lake Namtso; those associates are unregistered and membership in the yul-lha class is not a kin relation.
tibetan_yullha: A collective class of indigenous territorial/mountain deities ('gods of the local place'), not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested.
zuni_awonawilona: The supreme being who made himself into the Sun Father (Yatokka); the relationship is one of self-transformation/identity, not kinship, and no relation kind expresses 'is the prior form of'.
zuni_malokyattsiki: Salt Mother who dwells as the sacred Salt Lake and withdrew when her home was defiled; Zuni tradition gives her no parentage, and her associates are not registered here.
asmat_fumeripits: First-woodcarver culture-hero who carved and drummed the first humans to life; those carved ancestors are not registered as individuals, and he has no attested parentage or kin.
evenki_buga: The impersonal sky-universe being (personified as the grandmother Enekan Buga); the creator Seveki and lower-world lord Khargi are distinct figures with no attested kin link to Buga.
krachi_dente: Renowned oracle-deity of the Krachi, explicitly distinct from the sky-god Wulbari; no parentage or kin relation to other registered Krachi figures (Wulbari, Ananse) is attested.
marind_sosom: Initiation-giant dema of the male-initiation cult; a distinct dema not given kin ties to the registered Marind dema (Dinadin, Nubog, Geb), and no parentage is attested.
nenets_syadei: A collective class of guardian idol-spirits (syadei), not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested for the class.
senufo_madebele: A collective class of bush-spirits (madebele), not a single named figure; no individuated parentage or kinship is attested for the class.
tibetan_tonpa_shenrab: Legendary founder-reformer of Yungdrung Bön born in Olmo Lungring; the wives and sons of his Bön hagiography are not registered here, so no in-registry kin edge can be recorded.
